name: Don't fall asleep! | TGTF prank
description:
The boys' trip rule is simple: first to fall asleep gets pranked. It usually something harmless like waking up duct-taped to a tree or covered in toothpaste or getting thrown into the pool. But this year, something feels different. Will you give in to your body's exhaustion and risk getting pranked or will you force yourself to stay awake till someone else falls victim?

Edit: modified the character of Jake to be less aggressive based on feedback and self testing.
creator: Test_user2023
